creator: martinos987@gmail.com
text:
Is there any chance for this dovecot-mysql package?

I have recently completely abandoned updating applications from ports in favor of ready-made pkg packages, in terms of time consumption.

I have several mail servers for administration and everywhere I only have this one dovecot package installed from ports and the rest from pkg. It is a bit of a pain, not being able to update everything via pkg upgrade, because I have a lock on dovecot so as not to damage the servers.

If it were possible to create such a pkg, I would be extremely grateful.

It would make my life easier and probably other people's as well

Martin
